checks.description: The wave output must never assume an X or Z value during normal operation.
checks.pass_condition: wave is always a defined 5‑bit value (0 to 31) after reset release.

checks.description: After reset release, on each clock edge the wave output must change by exactly +1 while counting up and -1 while counting down, staying within 0..31.
notes: Spec defines deterministic increment/decrement by 1 per cycle.
State is internal; observable effect is monotonic change until bounds.
checks.pass_condition: For every consecutive pair of sampled cycles after reset, the absolute difference of wave is 1 and wave remains within 0 to 31 inclusive.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset has been released and the design is observed on successive clock edges.
